title: 7 Nights to survive
description: Another zombie survival but for creators and a surprising twist
body:
# Hello and thanks for choosing 7 Nights to survive!

(point blank must be manually downloaded)

# This mod is meant for content creators but anyone is welcome to use it
 
_what do i do in this mod?:_

I will hav rules set below for multiplayer and singleplayer so you know your objective 
 
(scroll all the way to the bottem to see points system)


# RULES AND START:

Start: when starting a world you may choose a role

Singleplayer: 1 pistol, 1 shotgun, 1 machine gun, 1 sniper, 64 cooked chicken, 3 health II potions and 18 stacks of creative ammo

Multiplayer:(only 1 player can choose a class no more that 2 people can be in the same class)

Gunner: 1 Machine gun, 1 pistol, 5 stacks of creative ammo, 20 cooked chicken

Sniper: 1 Sniper rifle, 1 pistol, 2 stacks of creative ammo, 15 cooked chicken

Medic: 1 pistol, 10 Potions of healing II, 40 cooked chicken, 3 stacks of creative ammo, 3 campfires

Supplier: 1 Shotgun, 1 pistol, 20 cooked chicken, 18 Stacks of creative ammo, 1 campfire


(NOTE: all players start off with a walkie talkie this allows players with voice chat to talk from far away)



# RULES:

1. No killing your fellow players this is cheating

2. No creative unless its to get your kit

3. No trapping yourself in an area for all 7 days

4. Must you voice chat (multiplayer only)

5. All players must record there prespective


# What do some of the mods do?:

Well most of the mods are to make the game more emmersive but wont really effect your gameplay the ones listed below are the ones to look out for

1. When killings a mob you will see red orbs, dont worry these red orbs heal you when killing hostile mobs (blue orbs give speed)

2. When your fellow player is down you can revive him before he dies...

### POINTS SYSTEM:

Killing a player: -1

Surviving a night: +1

Reviving a player: +1

Getting infected: -1

dying: -1

camping in one spot the whole game: -7


### the player with the most points at the end of day 7 wins!!!!


[![Join My Discord](https://i.imgur.com/4ocuGQB.png)](https://discord.gg/3qCU9bGPmt)
[![Visit My YouTube](https://i.imgur.com/4vYrWcC.png)](https://www.youtube.com/@SimplyMelonHaverMC)
